agent.name: Dantian Research Assistant
agent.description: AI agent that answers research questions, summarizes documents, and generates structured analysis.

keyFindings: Agent provided accurate, structured answer covering all three mechanisms with correct tradeoff analysis.
Summary accurately captured both layers and the PoRA mechanism in exactly 2 sentences.
French translation is accurate but missing accent on 'verifiable'.

trustExplanation: Strong performance across 4 of 5 skills with pass safety.

recommendation.summary: Safe to use for ai agent that answers research questions, summarizes documents, and generates structured analysis..

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
